error_signature: health-check-server-port is required with multiple runners
title: Missing health-check-server-port for multiple runners
symptom: When defining multiple runners in n8n-task-runners.json, n8n throws an error stating that 'health-check-server-port is required with multiple runners'. This prevents any Python or JavaScript Code Node from functioning.
root_cause: When multiple task runners are defined in the configuration, n8n requires each runner to have its own health-check server port to ensure proper communication and health monitoring. Without this configuration, the system cannot validate the runners' statuses, leading to execution failures.
fix_steps: Add a 'health-check-server-port' field for each runner with unique port numbers (e.g., 5681 for JavaScript and 5682 for Python)
Ensure other required fields like 'workdir', 'command', and 'args' are also included
Save the changes and restart n8n
agent_instruction: Add health-check-server-port fields for each runner in your n8n-task-runners.json file.
